title: ConvertKit vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit vs Klaviyo. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: ConvertKit vs Klaviyo: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: ConvertKit and Klaviyo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences. ConvertKit focuses on creators and course sellers, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation. This comparison will help you determine which platform is the right fit for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Landing pages, visual automations, affiliate program

choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or course seller looking for affordable email marketing
You want to earn recurring affiliate commissions (30% for 24 months)
You need built-in landing pages and visual automation builders
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business and need deep Shopify or WooCommerce integration
You want SMS marketing capabilities alongside email
You need predictive analytics and advanced segmentation for customer insights

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Klaviyo scores higher on G2 (4.6 vs 4.4) and excels for e-commerce businesses, while ConvertKit is better suited for creators and course sellers. Choose based on your business type and specific feature needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Klaviyo?
faq.a: ConvertKit is more affordable, starting at $29/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Additionally, ConvertKit's free tier supports up to 1,000 subscribers versus Klaviyo's 500, making ConvertKit the budget-friendly choice.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber list from Klaviyo to ConvertKit. Most email platforms allow CSV exports of your contacts. However, you'll need to manually recreate your automations and sequences in ConvertKit's builder.
